title: rosa tomentosa subvar. lasioclada
intro: Rosa tomentosa subvar. lasioclada, also known as the hairy rose, is a subvariety of the Rosa tomentosa plant, belonging to the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Rosa tomentosa subvar. lasioclada include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Rosa tomentosa subvar. lasioclada is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
